Re
Farn Porrrrcal PRncrrc".s, CourvrrssroN
P.O. Box 807 . .128 J $11se1 . $;rc, -nto. CA 958 ll-0807
(916) 3l:--5660 . Fux t9l6) 322-0886
November 6,2000
Lee Ann Adams
4465 David Way
San Bernardino, CA 92404
Your Request for Assistance
Our File No. 00-185
Dear Ms. Adams:
This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the conflict of
interest provisions of the Political Reform Act ("the Act").l The Act requires the
Commission to provide written advice to any person whose duties under the Act are in
question or to that person's authorized representative. (Section 831ta(b); Regulation
18329(bX1), enclosed.) Formal written advice is the application of the law to a particular
set of facts provided by the requestor and has the purpose of conferring immunity on the
requestor. (Section 8311a@); Regulation 18329(b)(7).) As such, the Commission does
not respond to requests relating to past conduct. (Section 8311a@); Regulation
18329(bX8XA).) The Commission may decline to provide informal assistance in such a
situation as well. (Section 8311a@); Regulation 18329(c)@)(A).)
Based on the facts included in your correspondence, we conclude that advice on
youf question would necessarily relate to past conduct. Therefore, the Commission
declines to issue advice on this matter. However, our decision to decline to provide
formal or informal advice is not a determination that we have reached a conclusion
regarding the question posed in your request.
For your information, we have enclosed two FPPC fact sheets entitled "Can I
Vote? Conflicts of Interest Overview" and "Overyiew of California's Conflict of Interest
Law," which provide general information on the conflict of interest rules. We hope this
information will be useful to you.
' Gorrernment Code sections 81000 - 91015. Commission regulations appeff at Title 2, sections 18109-
18996, of the Califomia Code of Regulations.


File No. 00-185
Page No. 2
If you have any other questions regardinl this matter, please contact me at (916)
322-5660.
Sincerely
Luisa Menchaca
Assistant General Counsel
0^
LQ
By:
E
Reform Consultant
Enclosures
